prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+8.6%）及本省考生总数大幅增长，扩招对位次的拉低效应被考生增加带来 的竞争加剧所抵消，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准106110名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约111811名，区间111311–112311名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest rank for science was approximately 53,716; in 2024, it was about 68,050; in 2025, for physics category, it was about 106,110. Over the past three years, the rank has continuously shifted backward, with a cumulative shift of about 52,394, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline rank for 2025 is about 106,110. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 5 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 81 in 2025, with significant year-on-year expansion. The 2026 physics category plan is 88, an increase of 7 from 2025, an expansion of about 8.6%, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 195th on the Soft Science main list (2025), not in the top 200 in 2026, with a slight decline in recent years. There are no significant public opinion incidents recorded in the reputation file. Douyin popularity ranks 30th, rated as 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.38 million, indicating some attention on short video platforms but not reaching high heat levels. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, and overall discipline strength is relatively average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (uncertain), a significant increase from the 2025 total of about 907,000 (physics category 555,000, history category 352,000), leading to sharply intensified competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Henan, and regional preferences may somewhat suppress the willingness of Henan candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+8.6%), and the significant increase in the number of provincial candidates, the lowering effect of expansion on rankings is offset by the intensified competition from increased candidates. It is predicted that the lowest rank for physics category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 106,110. The predicted lowest rank is about 111,811, with a range of 111,311 to 112,311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 111,311–112,311, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 110,000), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Oral Medicine and Clinical Medicine. If your rank is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 112,000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors.
